feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to access the VK11 'Create Condition Records for Pricing in Sales'
entry.content:
Unable to access the VK11 application in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. Even though we have created the required roles/authorizations and assigned them to our user, the application is still not available and remains unsearchable in the search bar (Fiori Launchpad / App Finder).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: End of Support indirect quotations BYOR (1S4)
entry.content:
As part of the information on release upgrade 2602, we have determined that the import of indirect quotations for the BYOR solution of scope item 1S4 will no longer be supported. 

In Europe and Germany, the European Central Bank (ECB) and the German Bundesbank are primarily available for retrieving exchange rates. Both institutions publish exchange rates for indirect quotation only.

Will the function for retrieving indirect quotations for the BYOR solution be completely disabled with release 2602?
If so, which institutions are recommended for retrieving direct quotations?

entry.title: TDR test environment scaling
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I'm preparation for you TDR Test refresh environment.  We would like to get confirmation that the Test environment is scaled appropriately to handle our Production volume. 

Could you please confirm that this will not be an issue? 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dispute management : New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
entry.content:
• New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
  • New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is showing wrong data for the Processor for Number of Disputes Current Month.

It is not showing correct data in the report

1. Dispute cases created in this month and assigned same processers for all the dispute cases

2. But in the app New Versus Solved Disputes – Today

When filtered ( By Dispute case( table current month )) it is showing correctly


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate NBP T-1 Exchange Rate logic in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on an S/4HANA Public Cloud project for a client in Poland. We have successfully automated the exchange rate feed from the National Bank of Poland (NBP) using the standard Datafeed (Refinitiv/MRM).

Polish VAT law requires using the exchange rate from the last working day preceding the service delivery (T-1 rule).

The automated feed correctly saves the rate with its true publication date (e.g., Jan 13 rate valid from Jan 13).

For an invoice created on Jan 14, the system should automatically pick up the Jan 13 rate.

The Issue: In standard SAP, the billing document looks for a rate matching the billing date. The customer currently uses a manual workaround by "shifting" the validity date of the Jan 13 rate to Jan 14 during manual upload so the system finds it. Since we are moving to automation, we can no longer "fake" the validity dates.

Question: What is the best practice in Public Cloud to handle this? I am considering using the BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER to set the Exchange Rate Date to Billing Date - 1.

- Is this the recommended approach for Poland local requirements?

- Are there any pitfalls with this BAdI approach regarding intercompany or credit memos?

- Is there a standard configuration setting I might be missing that handles this "look-back" logic natively?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EBRR postings did not post
entry.content:
We had our FI periods closed for Jan 2026 but the CO period was open for the same. Time confirmation postings had happened in Jan (CO documents for allocations - Credit Cost Center & Debit- WBS) at that time and since the FI periods were closed the EBRR postings for the WIP & Unbilled Revenue did not post. Now if we open the FI period for Jan, will we be able to trigger this posting - if not is there an alternate method to automatically post the WIP & Unbilled Revenue entries?

Thanks

Sebastian James

entry.title: How can Change project profile when copy Project
entry.content:
Dear Expert 

For copy project from A to B but we 'd like to change Project profile from Investment to Overhead 

Are there any way to change Profile because now the profile after copied is same and field isn't open to edit 

Thanks for your support 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom field visible in Order Confirmation PDF (In-Preparation) but blank in Completed status – S/4H
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an issue with Order Confirmation output in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition).

Scenario:
Created a custom field using the Custom Fields and Logic app

Extended the custom field to Sales Order Document Item

Enabled the field for:

Forms

Analytics

Created a custom Adobe Form template

Used the same data source as standard:
FDP_V1_ORDER_CONFIRM_SRV

Updated the Adobe form and uploaded it into the custom form template

Assigned the form template in:

Output Parameter Determination

General Settings (IMG)

Issue:
When creating a Sales Order, the custom field value is correctly displayed in the Order Confirmation PDF while the output item is in “In-Preparation” status

Once the output item is Completed, the custom field value is missing (blank) in the PDF

Question:
Is it possible to display custom fields in the Completed Order Confirmation PDF in S/4HANA Cloud?

If not, is there any SAP-supported workaround or official documentation confirming this limitation?

Any guidance or SAP references would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: overall release of purchase requisition vs Release of purchase requisition item
entry.content:
hi All,

In the manage workflows for purchase requisitions I have the both option overall release of purchase requisition vs Release of purchase requisition item. 
But is it possible to have both overall release and item wise release for one PR doc type?

Because I have two companies using the same system but one goes with overall release and other one uses item wise release. and when ever I activate both only the overall works and in order to item wise PR release to work, I have to untick overall release from configuration.

Please share some insight.
Thank you

entry.title: India Localization: TCS Tax Collected At Source
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the SAP Help Portal localization for India, there is a section on TCS (Tax Collected at Source). That it is applicable even to B2B business scenarios once a certain threshold amount is exceeded. 

However, based on our review of current regulations, it appears that TCS under GST is mainly applicable to e-commerce operators, and that the earlier value-threshold-based TCS under the Income Tax Act (Section 206C(1H)) may no longer be in effect.  

Based on the following government reference (Item No. 66), it appears that a sunset clause has been introduced for Section 206C(1H), making it inapplicable from 1 April 2025: (Please confirm if this is a real government reference)

https://www.pib.gov.in/PressReleseDetailm.aspx?PRID=2223309

“TCS on the sale of goods under Section 206C(1H) has been made ineffective. A sunset clause has been inserted, rendering the provisions inapplicable with effect from 1 April 2025.”

Question 1:
Could you please confirm whether the value-threshold-based TCS under Section 206C(1H) is indeed no longer applicable from April 2025? 

Question 2:
Apart from e-commerce operator scenarios under GST, are B2B (non-ecommerce) no longer affected?

Thank you so much.

entry.title: 自定义业务对象删除失败
entry.content:
我们在删除业务自定义业务对象时提示错误

 

扩展性细目中无任何相关性内容

 

请教下这个可能是什么原因导致的

entry.title: Email Notification for PO approvers in sap s4hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

         I have configured 

Workflow configured for PO - With Notification for Approved and Rejected PO.

Define Allowed Email Sender Domains For Email Outbound - @******.com Maintained.

Define Allowed Email Receiver Domains For Email Outbound - @******.com Maintained.

In sap screen inbox its Purchase Order came for approval. But No mail has been triggered.

E mail template:

1) YY1_00800238_CRT_ALL  - For Approvers to Approve PO

2) YY1_MMPUR_PO_WFL_APPROVAL   - For PO created user - PO approved

3) YY1_MMPUR_PO_WFL_REJECTION  - For PO created User - PO Rejected

In manage workforce also checked mail Id is maintained.

PO came for approval in approver's inbox and but mail is not triggering.

Also checked in "Monitor Email Transmission" app for test mail, there Status is Sent but again mail not received.

Kindly suggest a solution for this issue.

With Regards,

GOGUL

entry.title: #CoE#QUSS How to delete user on CBC directly?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Can we delete user on CBC directly? We are working on 3SL S/4 Public Cloud Landscape.

BR
David

entry.title: Manage Fixed Assets- New Version
entry.content:
Hi Support,

We are monitoring the Manage Fixed Assets - New Version app.

So far, it is not yet available in q-system.

Business catalog is already assigned to user.

Just wondering if this new app will be released this version or in future version.

This is to make an early action before any inconvenience to users occur.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Deactive Workflow for Service Entry Sheet
entry.content:
As requirement from Client, they don't have approval for Service Entry Sheet.

Currently, we configured as auto release. However, in material document overview, system will update "Created by" as SAP Workflow Runtime (SAP_WFRT) and cannot trace back the user who posted document.

Please support to de active Workflow for Service Entry Sheet.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Does 1K2 Revenue Recognition work with Intercompany Sales Order Processing 1HO?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are configuring the scope item 1K2 Revenue Recognition - Sales from Stock in a S4HC Public implementation. It works fine, but we have realized that it does not work for cross-company sales, having implemented the Intercompany Sales Order Processing – Domestic (1HO), not the advanced one (Advances Intercompany Sales - 5D2)?

Does 1K2 Revenue Recognition work with Intercompany Sales Order Processing 1HO)? Or are we missing some configuration?

Thanks. Regards

entry.title: Request for Standard Process Documentation: Installment Payments in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
I am using my Student ID to explore and learn SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud features. I am currently working on the configuration of Installment Payment Terms (Configured as 30/40/30 split).

I have completed the following settings:

  1. Created the Main Payment Term with the 'Installment Payment' checkbox active.

  2. Defined the breakdown percentages and linked them to specific payment terms.

Request: Could you please provide the official SAP Help link or the standard process flow for processing these installments in the 'Manage Automatic Payments' (F110) app? I want to understand how the system identifies individual installment due dates for automatic payment.

Thank you for your guidance.

entry.title: Application Process Task List (Planner) – Business Catalog Not Available in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,
We have checked the SAP Fiori Apps Library and identified that the business catalog SAP_EAM_BC_TL_MC is required to provide access to the relevant Application Process Task List (Planner) apps.

However, this catalog does not appear in our S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system.

Could you please suggest how we can get access to this application.

Thanks & Regards

Sandeep

entry.title: How to assign role to communication user in s/4hana public edition?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have created a communication arrangement of scenario SAP_COM_0120 in a partner version of S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. A communication user is created and used for inbound communication under this arrangement. 

However, I developed a ui5 app (in my trial BTP account) to consume the odata v2 service of a API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV. But this app failed to load resource. I guess the access to an API in this arrangement failed due to insufficient authorization.  I have traversed many apps, display communication scenarios, communication arrangements, maintain communication users and communication systems. None of them enables  the role assignment to communication user. 

The screenshot of the returned XML has been uploaded as attachment among others, including communication user and arrangement.

Is it possible that I need a BTP account of the same Public Cloud system to enable the access to the relevant APIs?  I registered this public cloud system in my BTP trial account and created a destination for it. If the App were developed in the same system,  there won't be a status of 404? 

Could anyone drop me some clue?

entry.title: Project Resource Demand - Service Activity Type Actualization & Revaluation of Projects
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP gurus, 

   Please forgive me if I'm missing something terribly simple, my client is going to use Cloud Public 2602 and I'm trying to discover the newly introduced functionalities and would like to clear one thing. In EPPM the design expectation is using the project structures in profile projects with revenues.

   I've created a project and a WBS, an internal resource demand for the WBS, assigned resource to a worker ( WBS, worker assigned to the same cost center), maintained worker's service level plan cost rate and spend some time to the project via My Timesheet application successfully. 

   I can monitor the costs by (allocated time * plan cost rate) in WBS, I also configured one of the rule line of the predefined splitting structure for the specific activity on service level as well. Actual cost rate calculation has been done and I could see the acual cost rate in "Manage Cost Rates - Actual" application, the output is consistent.

   Before all, I got to mention that I've changed the activity type main data as follows : Default Variance Values for Actual Allocation ->  Actual Price Indicator -> From none to 5 "Actual price, automatically based on activity". I know how material ledger handles the variances and revaluate the activity consumption but here I made an assumption that there might be some sort of a layer similar to ML which allows same functionality. Still, I went to actual costing run and wanted to observe if the activity is selected but the specific service activity is not selected as supposed.

   The question is, is it possible to handle the service activity p/a variances as a period end process and allocate them to the WBS in Cloud Public 2602 ? My clients expectation is monitoring the plan activities through the period and allocate the variances after calculated from "service" cost centers. In my point of view, there is no such layer or function to fullfill this expectation in standard however sort of work arounds can be applied such as manual distribution of variances to the projects by Universal Alloc. with rec. factor of these activities period end quantities.

   Thanks in advance for your interest and guidance.
